allow: PowerShell($chrome = "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; $out = "$env:TEMP\\kalp_test.png"; $prof = "$env:TEMP\\chrshot_$\(Get-Random\)"; Remove-Item $out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $a = @\("--headless=new","--disable-gpu","--no-sandbox","--no-first-run","--user-data-dir=$prof","--hide-scrollbars","--window-size=600,900","--virtual-time-budget=4000","--screenshot=$out","https://melikeebrukirkin.github.io/donen-kalp/"\); $p = Start-Process -FilePath $chrome -ArgumentList $a -NoNewWindow -Wait -PassThru; "exit: $\($p.ExitCode\)"; if\(Test-Path $out\){ "OK $\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes -> $out" } else { "no screenshot" })
